Best F1-scores are highlighted in bold, except for LLMs, to emphasize models trained from scratch or fine tuned on the target data.

Best F1-scores are highlighted in bold for all models except decoder-only LLMs, in order to emphasize approaches involving training or fine-tuning on the target data.
